action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Anderson, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, Arney, Billings, Fitzgerald, Joers, McCarville, Palmeri, Sinicki, Stroud, Stubbs, Taylor, Udell, Vining, Prado, Subeck and Tenorio; 
cosponsored by Senators Spreitzer, Smith, Dassler-Alfheim, Habush Sinykin, L. Johnson, Keyeski, Larson, Ratcliff and Roys
